subject: Re: Fwd: Last working day of year - NAPI
body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> May I tell that she may close the office early as
> soon as all 2005 work has  
> been posted?
>  
> Please advise.
>  
> Darren
> > Date: Thu, 29 Dec 2005 11:02:59 -0500
> To: DKIESQ@aol.com
> From: Peg Ugland <pegu@naproperty.com>
> Subject: Last working day of year
> 
> Darren,
> As in all previous years, I would like to let the
> NAPI staff leave early on 
> Friday as soon as all 2005 work has been posted.  In
> previous years, this 
> has been anywhere from noon to 4:00 depending on how
> things are 
> going.  This year we are in pretty good shape
> (famous last words).  Is it 
> OK to close after the 2005 work is done?
> Thanks.
> Peg
> 
>

body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

May I tell that she may close the office early as
soon as all 2005 work has
been posted?

Please advise.

Darren

Date: Thu, 29 Dec 2005 11:02:59 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Last working day of year

Darren,
As in all previous years, I would like to let the
NAPI staff leave early on
Friday as soon as all 2005 work has been posted. In
previous years, this
has been anywhere from noon to 4:00 depending on how
things are
going. This year we are in pretty good shape
(famous last words). Is it
OK to close after the 2005 work is done?
Thanks.
Peg
